name: @nyldn/open-image
description: Claude Code and Codex plugin for generating images with OpenAI GPT Image 2 and Gemini 3.1 Flash Image Preview.

scripts.smoke: node bin/open-image --dry-run --provider openai --prompt "A minimal app icon" && node bin/open-image --dry-run --provider gemini --prompt "A minimal app icon"

author: nyldn
